events.text: This is a demo session. In the real dashboard, this pane shows the live JSONL transcript of the selected Claude / Codex / Gemini session as it happens — every user turn, every tool call, every assistant reply, streamed block by block.

blocks.text: Right — I'll walk through the plan first, then implement. The demo doesn't actually run anything; it's a static snapshot of the dashboard's chrome plus a hand-written transcript fixture so you can see the layout.
Done. The new `/healthz` route returns `{ok: true, sha: <BUILD_SHA>}` and the smoke test passes. Install CCC locally to drive your own sessions through this dashboard.
